title: 1 step DFU - User can trigger firmware update for just Charge Case
scenario: Voyager Free 60+ Charge Case firmware update completes successfully without updating Earbuds when only Charge Case update is selected
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Ensure the Voyager Free 60 Earbuds and Charge Case are both powered on and connected to the app.
3. Verify both devices are on firmware version 5039 or higher.
4. Confirm a firmware update is available for both the Earbuds and the Charge Case.
5. From the Home screen, navigate to Settings → Update.
6. Tap the Update button to begin the firmware update process.
7. On the update screen, locate the Charge Case section and tap the Update button specifically for the Charge Case.
8. Wait for the Charge Case firmware update to complete.
expected: Only the Charge Case DFU completes successfully. The Earbuds remain on the lower firmware version (5039 or higher, but not updated).
